
# Upcoming NCGR Workshops{-}

<!-- ### Metagenomics Workshop{-}

- Fill out the online application here: 
[**Metagenomics Workshop Application**](https://forms.gle/FPYecmR5g41njK8TA)


- Application **due** by midnight **July 28, 2025**

- Space is limited!

#### When{-}

**August 04-08, 2025** (5 days)

9 am – 4 pm


- More Info about [**Metagenomics Workshops here**](https://inbre.ncgr.org/ncgr-workshops/metagenomics-workshop.html#metagenomics-workshop)  

#### How much does it cost?{-}

[**Click here**](https://inbre.ncgr.org/ncgr-workshops/how-much-do-the-workshops-cost.html#how-much-do-the-workshops-cost) to get workshop rates.  
-->


![](./Figures/ncgr.png){width=25%} 

### Pangenomics Workshop{-}

- Fill out this online application here: 
[**Pangenomics Workshop Application**](https://forms.gle/VfKu2sWezVQBPYE58)


- Application **due** by midnight **October February 23, 2026**

- Space is limited!

#### When{-}

**March 02-06, 2026** (5 days)

9 am – 4 pm


- More Info about [**Pangenomics Workshops here**](https://inbre.ncgr.org/ncgr-workshops/pangenomics-workshop.html)

#### How much does it cost?{-}

[**Click here**](https://inbre.ncgr.org/ncgr-workshops/how-much-do-the-workshops-cost.html#how-much-do-the-workshops-cost) to get workshop rates.

<br>

![](./Figures/ncgr.png){width=25%}


### Single Cell Workshop{-}

- Fill out this online application here: 
[**Single Cell Workshop Application**](https://forms.gle/xcfJYaHSDr4SQYUw9)


- Application **due** by midnight **March 02, 2026**

- Space is limited!

#### When{-}

**March 09-13, 2026** (5 days)

9 am – 4 pm


- More Info about [**Single Cell Workshops here**](https://inbre.ncgr.org/ncgr-workshops/single-cell-rna-seq-workshop.html#single-cell-rna-seq-workshop)

#### How much does it cost?{-}

[**Click here**](https://inbre.ncgr.org/ncgr-workshops/how-much-do-the-workshops-cost.html#how-much-do-the-workshops-cost) to get workshop rates.

<br>

![](./Figures/ncgr.png){width=25%}



#### Contact{-}

Please contact Project Coordinator, Ethan Price with any additional questions you may have at inbre@ncgr.org and we look forward to your participation!

Sponsored by New Mexico IDeA Network for Biomedical Research Excellence (NM-INBRE).
